summary: Phase 2 PLAN for Captains Fish and Chicken. Restaurant single-location depth model: menu-category x occasion x search-intent families plus a genuine-fact neighborhood ring. 35 internal routes planned (>=25, <500). External ordering links (DoorDash/Uber Eats/Grubhub) are CTAs, not pages. Call-only conversion (no lead form, no SMS) is buildable — the heavy CRO block contract binds only auto-dealer, not the restaurant archetype. Menu ships with owner-confirmed prices (Menu JSON-LD permitted).

checklist.note: Single 1616 1st Ave NE location; 3100 6th St SW excluded; no service-area SAP matrix
Menu-category pages derive from owner-confirmed menu; occasions/landings from confirmed offerings + Phase 1 keyword pillars
Lead form omitted + single call CTA (no SMS) — documented exception; restaurant archetype has no auto-dealer CRO block gate
Thin neighborhoods (Hiawatha/Robins) and late-night occasion folded; no fabricated local facts or hours claims
Only 2 neighborhood pages, each gated on real localFacts + >=2 proximity lines + >=1 town FAQ; fold if facts fail at authoring

pageMatrixStrategy.model: Restaurant single-location depth: menu-category x occasion x search-intent families, with a thin neighborhood ring folded to genuine-fact towns
pageFamilies: Menu hub + menu-category pages (from real menu sections)
Neighborhood pages (anti-doorway floor, genuine facts only)
pageMatrixStrategy.crossLinkPlan: Menu-category pages cross-link to related occasions + intent landings; occasions feature real menu items and link to their menu sections; intent landings link to the matching menu section + occasion + contact; neighborhoods link to menu hub + contact + nearest intent landing; home links to menu hub, top occasions, and top intent landings. Every occasion carries >=4 cross-links, every intent landing >=2.
pageMatrixStrategy.sapNote: No service-area SAP pages — single location, no multi-town service model. Neighborhood pages substitute and must clear the restaurant anti-doorway floor (localFacts>=1, proximityTrustLines>=2, townFaqs>=1) or fold.

requiredCroBlocks.note: Restaurant archetype has NO auto-dealer CRO block-presence contract (croContractFor('restaurant',...) === null), so the heavy dual-CTA/lead-form/6-fact-trust-grid gate does not bind. These are the restaurant conversion elements planned per kind. Call-only exception applies site-wide.
layoutSingleton: sticky mobile call bar (position:fixed, call-only tel:)
menu-hub-and-sections: item list with owner-confirmed prices (Menu JSON-LD)
documentedExceptions: lead-form OMITTED on home + contact (no external form endpoint; owner chose call-only)
dual-CTA reduced to SINGLE call CTA (no SMS/text number confirmed — no fake SMS line)
trust content rendered as 'why choose us' restaurant copy, NOT the auto-dealer 6-fact trust-grid gate (not applicable to restaurant archetype)

minimumPageCountRationale: 35 internal routes clears the 25 floor and stays well under 500. Composition: 1 home + 1 menu hub + 14 menu-category pages (from the owner-confirmed menu) + 6 occasion pages + 10 search-intent/story/info/faq landings + 2 genuine-fact neighborhood pages + 1 contact. The matrix maps 1:1 to the Phase 1 keyword pillars: menu-category depth (fried fish/chicken/wings/seafood/soul-food sides), occasion buying-moments (family/catering/game-day/fish-fry/seafood/lunch), and BOFU intent landings (fried catfish, fish & chicken near me, seafood takeout, soul food, party wings). External ordering links are CTAs, not pages, so externalCount = 0. If either neighborhood page's genuine facts fail at authoring, it folds and the count drops to 33-34 — still above the 25 floor.
